Democrats are denying full SNAP benefits to vulnerable Americans. For the first time in program history, SNAP funding has lapsed— leaving those who depend on it at risk of going hungry. Republicans voted to fully fund nutrition benefits and keep the entire federal government

Day 7: A new Harvard-Harris poll found 65% of Americans want the shutdown to end by passing a continuing resolution at current spending levels. The House passed this already. Senate Democrats are blocking it. They can reopen the government today.
Day 6: Senate Democrats continue to inflict pain on the American people — refusing to pass the clean funding extension the House approved weeks ago.

Day 5: The shutdown will limit services for veterans and VA benefits regional offices will be closed. Anyone who needs assistance should call the benefits hotline (M-F, 8am to 9pm ET) at 1-800-827-1000

Day 4: By voting to shut down the government, Democrats put critical USDA services in jeopardy. These political games harm rural America through disruptions to farm payments, disaster relief, food assistance, and other critical services.
Day 3: Washington’s Democrats shut down the government over taxpayer-funded subsidies that don’t expire until 2026. It’s October 3rd. 🧐
Day 2: Democrats voted against Biden’s spending levels, a continuation of current funding, which they supported in March. What’s changed? Political calculus.
